title: Archived Formic Acid and Formates Substance Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Archived Formic Acid and Formates Substance Group
- Formic Acid and Formates Substance Group
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Formic Acid and Formates Substance Group
None planned at this time
Formic acid, methyl ester
Formic acid, ethyl ester
Formic acid, sodium salt
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 151, No. 50 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 150, No. 53 .
